SEARCH
Package dev.quassel.ga.core

Class SearchRun<C>

java.lang.Object
dev.quassel.ga.core.SearchRun<C>
Type Parameters:
C - candidate type
public final class SearchRun<C> extends Object
Mutable runtime state of one concrete search run.

This object is owned by the runtime/registry layer. It stores snapshots, control flags and final result information for external inspection.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SearchRun(String runId)
    Creates a runtime object for one run ID.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    awaitIfPaused()
    Blocks the calling worker while the run is paused.
    Throwable
    failure()
    Returns the terminal failure if the run crashed.
    RunResult<C>
    finalResult()
    Returns the final result once the run has finished.
    RunSnapshot<C>
    latestSnapshot()
    Returns the most recent snapshot, or null if the run has not emitted one yet.
    boolean
    pauseRequested()
    Whether a pause has been requested.
    void
    requestPause()
    Requests the run to pause at the next safe synchronization point.
    void
    requestResume()
    Resumes a previously paused run.
    void
    requestStop()
    Requests the run to stop at the next safe synchronization point.
    String
    runId()
    Returns the unique run identifier.
    List<RunSnapshot<C>>
    snapshots()
    Returns an immutable view of all collected snapshots.
    long
    startedAtMillis()
    Returns the wall-clock start time in milliseconds since the epoch.
    RunStatus
    status()
    Returns the current lifecycle state of the run.
    boolean
    stopRequested()
    Whether a stop has been requested.

      Returns the wall-clock start time in milliseconds since the epoch.

      Returns an immutable view of all collected snapshots.

      snapshot list

    • latestSnapshot

      public RunSnapshot<C> latestSnapshot()
      Returns the most recent snapshot, or null if the run has not emitted one yet.
      Returns:
      latest snapshot or null

    • finalResult

      public RunResult<C> finalResult()
      Returns the final result once the run has finished.
      Returns:
      final result or null

      Returns the terminal failure if the run crashed.
